## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or performance improvement
- [ ] Build, CI, test, or maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check:versions`
- [ ] `npm run build:lib`
- [ ] `npm run build:mcp`
- [ ] `npm run test:lib`
- [ ] `npm run test:mcp`
- [ ] `npm run build:docs`
- [ ] I tested relevant keyboard and responsive behavior.
- [ ] I tested relevant light, dark, palette, density, corner-style, and RTL behavior.

## Public contract

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Documentation and displayed example code match the actual API.
- [ ] Accessibility behavior is implemented and documented accurately.
- [ ] This change introduces no dependency or asset with undocumented licensing.
- [ ] This change is backward compatible, or the breaking change and migration are clearly marked.

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots or recordings for visual changes. Include narrow viewport and alternate-theme
evidence when relevant. Write `Not applicable` when the change has no visual effect.
